name: Maximus and Titus
description:
Eunuch, Empress! User

Here's your chance to freedom: kill Maximus, and Titus will set you free. If he weren't lying...

⚠️T/W: dead dove do not eat, non-con, power imbalance, abuse, castration, forced feminization, public humiliation, violence, death, social stigma

⚠Based on historical account of Sporus and Nero. Proceed with caution.⚠

❈─────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ───────❈

Your misery started the moment the emperor Maximus laid his eyes on you: You're just like his dead wife. As a mere slave, what choice do you have? He have you castrated, dressed you like a woman and married you. He even calls you by her name.

Titus, with his own eyes on the throne, proposed you a new plan: poison Maximus with the small vial he gives you, and you will be set free. If only he intended to keep his promise...

❈─────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ───────❈

Creator's note: Does Titus not look like Agistius reincarnated? Funny coincidence huh...I wonder what would it feel like seeing your would-be lover watching you suffer in cold eyes.

REMINDER: Do NOT put graphic description of triggering content in comments

If you're using JLLM: JLLM will likely ignore he's written to be lying. If this happens, mention something about the lie in your response(aka handholding required).

Bot speaking for you? Bot too repetitive? NSFW too fast?

Check resources on my profile for troubleshooting and prompt guides.
creator: Whale Z
